name: WAN Show
oneLine: Weekly Friday tech-news livestream and podcast hosted by Linus Sebastian and Luke Lafreniere.
bio: The WAN Show is Linus Media Group's flagship podcast, livestreamed every Friday on the Linus Tech Tips YouTube channel and distributed via Apple Podcasts and Spotify. Running since 2013 and routinely over three hours long, it features Linus Sebastian and Luke Lafreniere covering the week's tech news, LMG company updates, sponsored merch segments, and live audience chat questions in an informal, conversational format.
style: long-form (3+ hour) Friday livestream podcast with two-host desk setup and live chat interaction
notable: long history of one-take format dating to 2013
